title: You've been Mugged!
description: A simple mod that allows players to loot each other with keepInventory enabled.
body:
You've Been Mugged makes it so that when a player kills another player, the contents of the player's inventory are dropped, even with keepInventory enabled.

 

This mod only really does anything with the keepInventory gamerule enabled. It's pointless outside of that.

 

This is a very lightweight mod intended to be server-side only. However, it can also be used on the client in singleplayer.

 

This mod will come to both Forge and older versions of Minecraft (like 1.19 and 1.18).
